videos.headline: International Business Development & Market Entry Experts
videos.description:
A global consulting and business development firm supporting companies in entering new markets, building distribution channels, and creating international partnerships.
Contact Me
At Aidni Global, we combine market research, strategy, and on-ground execution to help businesses grow across borders. Our network spans India, Europe, Hong Kong, and the UAE — providing clients with localized insights and industry connections.

We specialize in market entry, business development, investor facilitation, feasibility studies, and expansion strategy.

videos.headline: Breaking update.
videos.description:
US Defence Secretary claims a US submarine torpedo sank Iran’s warship IRIS Dena in the Indian Ocean.

32 crew rescued.

Over 100 sailors reported missing.

Sri Lanka confirms rescue operations underway.

Pentagon calls it first such US naval attack since World War II.

Tensions rise in the region.

videos.headline: “US SUBMARINE SINKS IRAN WARSHIP!” First Since WWII?
videos.description:
Breaking update.

US Defence Secretary claims a US submarine torpedo sank Iran’s warship IRIS Dena in the Indian Ocean.

32 crew rescued.

Over 100 sailors reported missing.

Sri Lanka confirms rescue operations underway.

Pentagon calls it first such US naval attack since World War II.

Tensions rise in the region.

If you say “Generate Image”, I’ll create a high-impact vertical thumbnail featuring a submarine silhouette, explosion at sea, and “101 MISSING” highlight for maximum CTR.
